## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes (frontend type-check & build)
- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` are clean (if backend changed)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Contributor License Agreement](../CONTRIBUTING.md#contributor-license-agreement-please-read),
      including granting the maintainer the right to relicense my contribution
